assertions.assertion: The response identifies the root cause as the API starting before IdentityServer is ready
assertions.rationale: Response states 'your API is starting before IdentityServer is ready'

assertions.assertion: The response recommends using .WaitFor(identityServer) on the API project in the AppHost
The response recommends using .WithReference(identityServer) on the API project to make the endpoint URL available
The response mentions that IdentityServer needs health checks (e.g., MapHealthChecks or /health endpoint) for WaitFor to work
assertions.rationale: Dedicated section explaining health check requirement with code for AddHealthChecks() and MapHealthChecks("/health")
